---
title: "The Middle Author Bioinformatician"
css: styles.css
---

I write about Bioinformatics, Gut Microbiome, The Microbiome-Gut-Brain axis and Science in general. I also share some personal thoughts and keep track of my path to becoming something more than just another middle author bioinformatician.

<br>

<input type="text" id="searchInput" placeholder="Search posts..." style="margin-bottom:20px; padding:8px; width:100%; max-width:400px;">

::: {#posts-container .posts-grid}
:::

```{=html}
<script>
const posts = [
  {
    title: "Common Limitations of Gut Microbiome Meta-Analyses Undermine their Credibility",
    description: "Reading time: 10 mins",
    image: "images/blog_metaanalysis.png",
    link: "https://bvalderrama.substack.com/p/common-limitations-of-gut-microbiome"
  },
  {
    title: "When Good Science Goes Wrong: How Batch Effects Can Obscure Biology",
    description: "Reading time: 10 mins",
    image: "images/blog_batch.png",
    link: "https://bvalderrama.substack.com/p/when-good-science-goes-wrong-how"
  },
  {
    title: "The South American MicroBiome Archive",
    description: "Reading time: 1 min",
    image: "images/blog_samba.png",
    link: "https://bvalderrama.substack.com/p/common-limitations-of-gut-microbiome"
  },
  {
    title: "If I Had to Learn to Code Again ...",
    description: "Reading time: 2 mins",
    image: "images/blog_code_again.png",
    link: "https://bvalderrama.substack.com/p/if-i-had-to-learn-to-code-again"
  }
];
</script>
```


```{=html}
<script>
const container = document.getElementById("posts-container");

function displayPosts(filteredPosts) {
  container.innerHTML = "";

  filteredPosts.forEach(post => {
    const card = document.createElement("div");
    card.className = "post-card";

    card.innerHTML = `
      <a href="${post.link}" target="_blank">
        <img src="${post.image}" alt="${post.title}">
        <h3>${post.title}</h3>
        <p>${post.description}</p>
      </a>
    `;

    container.appendChild(card);
  });
}

displayPosts(posts);
</script>
```
```{=html}
<script>
document.getElementById("searchInput").addEventListener("input", function(e) {
  const query = e.target.value.toLowerCase();

  const filtered = posts.filter(post =>
    post.title.toLowerCase().includes(query) ||
    post.description.toLowerCase().includes(query)
  );

  displayPosts(filtered);
});
</script>
```
```{=html}
<style>
.posts-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(280px, 1fr));
  gap: 20px;
}

.post-card {
  border: 1px solid #ddd;
  border-radius: 10px;
  overflow: hidden;
  transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
  background: white;
}

.post-card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-5px);
  box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
}

.post-card img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 180px;
  object-fit: cover;
}

.post-card h3 {
  margin: 10px;
  font-size: 1.2rem;
}

.post-card p {
  margin: 10px;
  color: #555;
}

.post-card a {
  text-decoration: none;
  color: inherit;
}
</style>
```
